permissions.fallback_msg: The docx skill needs to read files (e.g., .docx archives, unpacked XML, documentation files) from the local workspace.
The docx skill needs to write files (e.g., unpacked XML, generated scripts, output .docx files, markdown exports) to the local workspace.
The docx skill needs to run shell commands such as pandoc, python scripts (unpack.py / pack.py), soffice, pdftoppm, grep, and npm to process documents.
The docx skill may need to install dependencies (pandoc, libreoffice, poppler-utils, defusedxml, docx npm package) if they are not already present.
The docx skill requires loading skill-local documentation files (docx-js.md, ooxml.md) into the agent session as context before performing document operations.
